title: Why can't you buy Just one seat for standard plan?
excerpt: Why can’t you just buy one seat???

posts.author: Tricia (TriciaHRHCAC)
posts.cookedHtml: Why can’t you just buy one seat???

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tricia,

I hear you and will relay your comment internally

For more background, our platform was designed as a collaboration tool to help teams work together, our pricing model reflects having multiple members on an account together. That said, I recognise is not ideal for small teams like your own, and as mentioned, will be sharing these frustrations internally.

Incase you’re not aware, we do have a free, individual plan available for our solo users → https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010487220-Understanding-the-Free-Plan. We also have our Basic plan which is our most affordable plan.
